Name: Sagar Thapa
Text: Abhay is one of the most technically sound developers I've worked with. His ability to break down complex backend problems and deliver clean, maintainable solutions is exceptional. He was instrumental in architecting our logistics platform.

Name: Rahul Shrestha
Text: Working with Abhay was a great experience. He brings a rare combination of technical depth and product thinking. He doesn't just write code — he understands the business impact and builds accordingly.
